raw_reaction: 天晴れだ　生涯貴様を忘れることはないだろう
reason: The solution handles the original stopping time exactly, proves E[tau]=sum P(S_n<=1), and obtains P(S_n<=1)=1/n! by identifying the survival-prefix gap simplex with normalized independent exponential clocks. This is mathematically correct, concise, and genuinely distinct from direct simplex-volume integration rather than a cosmetic rename.
